data.title: Genprex Highlights Promising Preclinical Data for Diabetes Gene Therapy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Genprex ( (GNPX) ) has shared an update.

On April 28, 2026, Genprex announced that research collaborators will present new preclinical data on its diabetes gene therapy candidate GPX-002 at the American Society of Gene and Cell Therapy annual meeting in May 2026. The study in Type 2 diabetic mouse models found that pancreatic delivery of an AAV-encoded Pdx1/MafA construct reversed hyperglycemia, improved glucose-stimulated insulin secretion and shifted beta cells toward a more mature, functional state.

Mice on a high-fat diet that received the CMV- or beta-cell–targeted RIP versions of the therapy showed insulin secretion similar to healthy controls and a restoration of normal glycemic control four weeks after treatment. The findings, including increased mature insulin granules and complete rescue of diet-induced hyperglycemia after direct intrapancreatic infusion, underscore the potential for translating this gene therapy approach to humans via pancreatic delivery techniques, with implications for long-term management of Type 2 diabetes.

More about Genprex

Genprex, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing gene therapy treatments, including candidates targeting diabetes and oncology. Its pipeline includes a diabetes gene therapy program aimed at improving or restoring pancreatic beta-cell function, with an emphasis on potential long-term glycemic control in Type 2 diabetes patients.

Average Trading Volume: 1,034,912

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $9.39M

For a thorough assessment of GNPX stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

AIQ Limited ( (GB:AIQ) ) has provided an announcement.

AIQ Limited reported that all resolutions proposed at its latest annual general meeting were duly passed by shareholders. Investors approved the company’s annual report and accounts for the year ended October 2025, reappointed PKF Littlejohn LLP as auditor, and granted authority to allot equity securities for cash.

The resolutions received unanimous proxy support, with 26,638,555 votes cast in favour and none against, suggesting strong shareholder backing for the company’s governance and financial reporting. The approval of the authority to issue equity securities for cash also provides the board with flexibility to raise capital if needed, potentially supporting future corporate or financing actions.

Valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no indicated dividend yield.

AIQ Limited is a company listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker AIQ. The company has 64,760,721 ordinary shares in issue, with no shares held in treasury, and operates under a one-share, one-vote structure for shareholder resolutions at general meetings.

data.title: International Care Company narrows 2025 loss and appoints new auditor
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

International Care Company S.p.A ( (IT:ICC) ) has issued an update.

International Care Company S.p.A., a listed Italian assistance services and digital health provider with a 24/7 multilingual control center, reported 2025 revenues of €9.25 million, mostly from institutional clients such as insurers and funds. The group operates four business lines spanning travel and home assistance, health and elderly care, concierge call centers and third-party claims management, with a growing international presence through its stake in Paris-based IAG.

At its ordinary shareholders’ meeting, ICC approved the 2025 financial statements, posting a narrowed net loss of €566,000 on higher revenues, improved EBITDA and a swing to a positive net financial position. The loss will be carried forward, while shareholders appointed RSM Società di Revisione e Organizzazione Contabile S.p.A. as the new statutory auditor for 2026–2028, reinforcing financial oversight as the company works to consolidate its operational recovery.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:ICC) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on International Care Company S.p.A stock, see the IT:ICC Stock Forecast page.

More about International Care Company S.p.A

International Care Company S.p.A. is an Italian assistance services provider focused on personal support, digital health assistance and claims management, operating a multilingual 24/7 control center. Founded in 2018 through the contribution of units from FD Service S.p.A. and FD W.OR.L.D. Care S.r.l., it serves mainly institutional clients such as insurers, funds, trade associations, multinationals and public bodies in Italy and abroad.

The group operates across four business lines covering travel, home and vehicle assistance, digital health and elderly care, concierge and call center services, and claims handling on behalf of third parties. ICC is one of the leading domestic players in personal assistance with a growing international footprint via its 9.53% stake in Paris-based IAG, generating 2025 revenues of €9.25 million, mostly in Italy but with significant exposure to Europe and the rest of the world.

Average Trading Volume: 4,328

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €6.39M

Nova Minerals Limited Sponsored ADR ( (NVA) ) has issued an update.

On April 28, 2026, Nova Minerals Limited confirmed it had dispatched a Scheme Booklet and Notice of Scheme Meeting to shareholders, ADS holders and listed warrantholders as part of its proposed redomiciliation from Australia to the United States via interlocking schemes of arrangement. The booklet, registered with ASIC and available online, outlines independent expert support for the share and warrant schemes, director recommendations to vote in favour, details of in-person and virtual scheme meetings scheduled in Sydney on May 29, 2026, and the planned exchange ratios under which investors would receive shares, CDIs or warrants in a new Nevada-incorporated U.S. holding company to be listed on ASX and the NYSE.

data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Beijing UBOX Online Technology Corp. Class H ( (HK:2429) ) has shared an announcement.

Beijing UBOX Online Technology Corp. has convened its 2025 annual general meeting for May 28, 2026 in Shenzhen, where shareholders will review the company’s 2025 annual report, board work report, profit distribution plan, and consolidated financial statements, as well as the financial budget for 2026. Investors will also vote on reappointing PricewaterhouseCoopers as auditor, adjusting remuneration for key executives including the chairman and CFO, withdrawing a prior CSRC application tied to a Pre-IPO incentive scheme, and granting the board a broad share issuance and treasury share disposal mandate that could influence future capital management and shareholder dilution.

The agenda underscores routine governance items alongside strategic capital and incentive decisions that may affect the company’s financial flexibility and executive alignment with shareholder interests. The proposed general mandate to issue additional shares and deal with treasury shares aims to give the board more room to respond to financing needs or market opportunities within Hong Kong listing rules, while the withdrawal of the Pre-IPO share incentive application signals a shift in the company’s approach to equity-based compensation and regulatory engagement in mainland China.

More about Beijing UBOX Online Technology Corp. Class H

Beijing UBOX Online Technology Corp. is a joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China and listed in Hong Kong under stock code 2429. The company operates in the technology sector, with a focus on online and automated services, and reports to shareholders through annual general meetings held in mainland China.

CML Microsystems ( (GB:CML) ) has provided an update.

CML Microsystems said it will publish its preliminary full-year results on 17 June 2026, a key disclosure for investors tracking the communications-focused chip designer’s growth trajectory. Management will also brief analysts at an in-person presentation in London the same day, underscoring efforts to engage the market amid continued structural demand for its specialised RF and mixed-signal products.

The forthcoming update will be closely watched given CML’s exposure to long-term drivers such as faster and more secure data transmission, global telecoms upgrades and expanding private wireless networks for industrial IoT. With a solid balance sheet and established blue-chip customer relationships, the timing and format of the results announcement highlight the group’s confidence in its operational performance and its positioning in niche, high-barrier semiconductor markets.

Spark’s Take on CML Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CML is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weakening financial performance (declining revenue, negative profitability, and sharply lower free cash flow) and bearish technical momentum (below key moving averages with very low RSI and negative MACD). This is partially offset by an attractive valuation (low P/E) and a high dividend yield, plus low leverage on the balance sheet.

To see Spark’s full report on CML stock, click here.

More about CML Microsystems

CML Microsystems is a UK-based developer of mixed-signal, RF and microwave semiconductors serving global communications markets. The group targets high-growth, high-barrier sub-segments such as advanced telecoms infrastructure and private wireless networks tied to the industrial internet of things, selling to a diversified blue-chip customer base across the UK, Asia and the U.S.

The company operates an asset-light model using outsourced manufacturing and in-house testing, with trading operations spanning major international hubs. It is cash-generative, debt-free and pays dividends, positioning it as a financially conservative participant in the communications semiconductor supply chain.

data.title: Hycroft Mining Reports Strong Q1 Results, Resource Growth
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hycroft Mining Holding ( (HYMC) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 28, 2026, Hycroft Mining reported its first-quarter 2026 results, highlighting an injury-free safety record with more than 1.4 million work hours without a lost-time incident and a strong balance sheet holding $189 million in cash and no debt. The company also disclosed a roughly 55% increase in measured and indicated gold and silver resources, the establishment of an initial high-grade underground silver resource, and index inclusions that signal rising market visibility.

Operationally, Hycroft continued its 2025–2026 exploration drill program at the Brimstone and Vortex high-grade silver systems, completing more than 9,000 meters of drilling and extending high-grade mineralization at both zones. For the remainder of 2026, the miner plans to add drill rigs, accelerate exploration, advance economic and processing studies—including a preliminary economic assessment and process trade-off work—and complete drilling and metallurgical tests that could support a potential restart of heap leach operations and lay groundwork for future development.

Spark’s Take on HYMC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HYMC is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (losses, no recent revenue, and ongoing cash burn), partially offset by strong technical momentum and a set of positive project-focused corporate developments. Valuation provides limited support due to negative earnings and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on HYMC stock, click here.

More about Hycroft Mining Holding

Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation is a U.S.-based gold and silver company focused on exploring and developing the Hycroft Mine in northern Nevada, one of the world’s largest precious metals deposits. After a long history of oxide heap leach operations, the company is conducting a robust 2025–2026 drill program and technical studies to transition the mine to milling sulfide mineralization and to expand two newly discovered high-grade silver systems.

Average Trading Volume: 3,819,922

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.46B
